title: Iceberg bad format v3 error message
description:
### Describe the bug
Reading an empty Iceberg v3 table created in Spark gives a bad error in ClickHouse.
### How to reproduce
Run: [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23161783/spark.py)
Then in ClickHouse:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/t0/test/t0');
--DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Invalid access: Can not convert empty value.. (POCO_EXCEPTION)
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 1000. DB::Exception: Invalid access: Can not convert empty value. (POCO_EXCEPTION), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::InvalidAccessException::InvalidAccessException(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000247db4f2
1. base/poco/Foundation/include/Poco/Dynamic/Var.h:164: long Poco::Dynamic::Var::convert<long>() const @ 0x000000001927dd84
2. base/poco/JSON/include/Poco/JSON/Object.h:147: DB::IcebergMetadata::getStateImpl(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, Poco::SharedPtr<Poco::JSON::Object, Poco::ReferenceCounter, Poco::ReleasePolicy<Poco::JSON::Object>>) const @ 0x00000000193aa976
3. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:452: DB::IcebergMetadata::getState(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, String const&, int) const @ 0x00000000193a4439
4. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:179: DB::IcebergMetadata::getRelevantState(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&) const @ 0x00000000193a3fa4
5. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:854: DB::IcebergMetadata::getTableSchema(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x00000000193aee30
6. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:176: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageLocalConfiguration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::tryGetTableStructureFromMetadata(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x00000000172f1307
7. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/Utils.cpp:85: DB::resolveSchemaAndFormat(DB::ColumnsDescription&, String&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration> const&, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings>, String&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&) @ 0x00000000192b5002
8. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/StorageObjectStorage.cpp:172: DB::StorageObjectStorage::StorageObjectStorage(std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, DB::StorageID const&, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, DB::ConstraintsDescription const&, String const&, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings>, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel, std::shared_ptr<DataLake::ICatalog>, bool, bool, bool, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>, bool, bool) @ 0x0000000019145d76

10. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/construct_at.h:49: std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorage> std::allocate_shared[abi:se190107]<DB::StorageObjectStorage, std::allocator<DB::StorageObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>&, DB::StorageID const&, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, DB::ConstraintsDescription const&, String const&, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings>&, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel const&, std::shared_ptr<DataLake::ICatalog>, bool const&, bool, bool, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, 0>(std::allocator<DB::StorageObjectStorage> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>&&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>&, DB::StorageID const&, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, DB::ConstraintsDescription const&, String const&, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings>&, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel const&, std::shared_ptr<DataLake::ICatalog>&&, bool const&, bool&&, bool&&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&) @ 0x000000001df6e3ec
11. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/shared_ptr.h:851: DB::(anonymous namespace)::createStorageObjectStorage(DB::StorageFactory::Arguments const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>) @ 0x000000001df6b611

19. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:744: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001e9fa1ee
20. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2818: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001ea13f64
21. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x000000002488efc7
22. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115: Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() @ 0x000000002488f5a5

```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER, value INTEGER NULL, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, value, description) VALUES (1, NULL, 'First entry'), (2, 100, 'Second entry');
SELECT t1.id, t1.name, t2.value FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Reading empty Iceberg v3 table in ClickHouse
